ingredients_text: Cereal flakes 77% (oat flakes, wheat flakes, rye flakes), mixture of dried and candied fruit 20% (raisins, banana (banana, sugar, coconut oil), papaya (papaya, sugar, sulphur dioxide) , pineapple (pineapple, sugar, acid: citric acid, sulphur dioxide), date(date, rice flour)), corn flakes 3% (corn grits, sugar, salt, barley malt extract)
